summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of French language support (EN/FR toggle) for AI Governance consulting website. All 16 features tested successfully. Language toggle works correctly across all pages, Portfolio page correctly stays in English, and localStorage persistence verified.
passed_tests: Language toggle button (data-testid='lang-toggle') in navbar switches between EN and FR correctly
Home page displays correctly in English with all content translated
Home page displays correctly in French - 'Gouvernance IA' title, 'Voir les services' button, 'Classification des risques' capabilities
Services page displays correctly in both languages - French shows 'Services' title with 'Ce que je livre', 'Offres principales'
Service Menu page displays correctly in French - 'Menu des services', 'Forfait 1: Fondation de gouvernance', 'Livrables'
Cases page displays correctly in French - 'Études de cas' title with French UI labels, case content in English
Tool (Readiness Snapshot) page works in French - 'Instantané de préparation en gouvernance IA', 'Choisissez votre secteur', all sectors translated
Tool questions display in French - 'Avez-vous un inventaire documenté...' etc.
Tool results display in French - 'Risque élevé', 'Détail des scores', 'Prochaines étapes recommandées'
Research page displays correctly in French - 'Recherche' title, 'Comment cette recherche fonctionne'
Library page displays correctly in French - 'Bibliothèque de gouvernance IA', 'Cadres fondamentaux'
FAQ page displays correctly in French - questions and answers fully translated
About page displays correctly in French - 'À propos', 'Ce que signifie la Pratique de gouvernance IA'
Connect page displays correctly in French - 'Contact' title, 'Envoyer un message', 'Réserver un entretien' tabs, all form labels translated
SealedCard page displays correctly in French - 'PROTOCOLE DE RECHERCHE', French introduction and concepts
Portfolio page correctly remains in ENGLISH regardless of language setting - 'Publications & Frameworks', 'Working Papers'
Footer displays correctly in French - '© 2026 Martin Lepage, PhD. Pratique et recherche en gouvernance IA'
Language preference persists in localStorage - verified 'lang' key stores 'fr' or 'en'
Language preference persists after page reload - navigation stays in selected language
All navigation links work properly in both languages - data-testid selectors working correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: French language support fully implemented and tested. Language toggle (data-testid='lang-toggle') in navbar works correctly. All pages except Portfolio and Admin have French translations. Portfolio page intentionally stays in English per user request. localStorage persistence works with 'lang' key. Translation files at /app/frontend/src/translations/en.js and fr.js. LanguageContext at /app/frontend/src/context/LanguageContext.js provides language, toggleLanguage, and t (translations object).
design_observations: UI looks clean and professional in both languages. Good text contrast and spacing maintained. French translations are comprehensive and well-written, including proper French typography (accents, proper punctuation).
